hero.heading: Heritage Bangalore
hero.description: Authentic Davangere-style benne dosas — crispy, buttery, and made with the kind of care that turns a meal into a memory.

knownFor.heading: What we're known for
knownFor.subtitle: Simple food done right. The way Bangalore's darshinis have been doing it for decades.

cards.title: The Benne Dosa
cards.description: Crispy Davangere-style, generously smeared with white butter. The dish that started it all. From ₹120.

cards.title: Filter Coffee
cards.description: Strong, frothy, aromatic. Brewed the traditional South Indian way. ₹40 a cup.

cards.title: The Darshini Way
cards.description: Standing tables, quick service, quirky nicknames instead of order numbers. An experience, not just a meal.

cta.heading: Craving a dosa?
cta.subtitle: Average meal ₹200–400 per person. Walk in, no reservations needed.
